title: Module/etc never assigned a symbol entry
body:
I am working with version `4.211`, built from master on Thursday 22nd.

I am trying to test this FPU (https://github.com/pulp-platform/fpnew), and for the time being I'm trying to make sure that I have all the dependencies needed (it needs files from from other projects).

I am running the following command:

`verilator --cc  -Ihdl/ -Ihdl/fpu_div_sqrt_mvp ./hdl/fpu_div_sqrt_mvp/defs_div_sqrt_mvp.sv ./hdl/cf_math_pkg.sv ./hdl/fpnew_pkg.sv ./hdl/fpnew_top.sv`

With it, i got the following output:

```
%Error: Internal Error: hdl/fpu_div_sqrt_mvp/defs_div_sqrt_mvp.sv:14:9: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:398: Module/etc never assigned a symbol entry?
   14 | package defs_div_sqrt_mvp;
      |         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```

I have found nothing on the manual related to this error. Besides, I have checked the code, looking for something that could cause this error, but found nothing that lead me to think so. In folder `hdl/fpu_div_sqrt_mvp` I have all the hdl files of that project, so the package is being actually used. 

I had done some previous tests regarding package usage, and never found this issue. The only changes I did to the original code was importing the packages as required by the IEEE standard.
